narrative:
Precinct St Clairsville 4-B (precinct in Belmont County) has 445 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
